verses.text: Leitungah mite tam dingin hong kipanin, amau' sung panin tanute hong suah ciangin
vana om mite in leitung mite' tanute hoihsa uh ahih manin a deih bangun amaute zi-in a la uh hi

Tua ciangin Topa in, “Mihingte sungah ka Kha om paisuak nawnlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte a mawh hi khinta a, kum za leh kum sawmnih sung kisikna ding hun kipia lai bek ding hi,” a ci hi

Vana om mite in leitung mihing tanute luppihin, amaute in ta a neih hun laitak hita leh tua khit hita leh, amau' suanlekhak Nefilim a kici mite leitungah om hi. Hih mite pen tang lai-a mi thahat, mi minthangte ahi uh hi
Leitungah mihing a gitlohna a liatna leh mihing lungsim ngaihsutna peuhmah a sia ahih ngitngetna thu Topa in mu hi
Leitungah mihing a bawl pen Topa khial kisa a, tua thu in ama lungsim dahsak hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in, “Ka pian'saksa mihing, ganhing, a bokvak ganhingte leh huih lak vasate, leitung panin ka phiatkhia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute ka bawl ka khial hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Noah in Topa' maipha mu hi.
Noah' tangthu hih bang ahi hi. Noah a thuman mi khat hi a, ama khangah paubaanglo hi. Noah pen Pasian tawh kikhawl hi
Noah in tapa thum, Shem, Ham, leh Jafeth a nei hi
Tu-in Pasian' muhna-ah leitung sia a, leitungah ngongtatna kidim hi
Pasian in leitung en a, a kisiagawp mu hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah mi khempeuh a sia-in a gamtalo kuamah omlo hi
Pasian in Noah' kiangah, “Mi khempeuh beisak ding ka khentat zo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau' hangin leitungah ngongtatna kidim hi. En in, leitung tawh amaute ka susia khawm ding hi
Nang-a' dingin noah-taak sing tawh teembaw khat bawl in. Teembaw sungah a deite bawl in la, a sung leh a pua kultal tui tawh zut in
Na bawlna ding dan hih bang ahi hi: Teembaw a sauna pi zali sawmnga, a zaina pi sawmsagihnga, a san'na pi sawmlinga hi ding hi
Teembaw-a' dingin kongkhak khat bawl in la, tua tung pi khat leh alang ciangah zawh bawl in. A pangah teembaw kongkhak bulh in. A dawl nuainung, a dawl nihna leh a dawl thumnate bawl in
Bang hang hiam cih leh, en in, leitungah a om nuntak husan'na a nei khempeuh a susia dingin leitungah tuiciin ka tungsak ding hi. Leitunga om khempeuh si ding hi
Ahih hangin nang tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak ding hi. Teembaw sungah nang na hong pai ding hi. Nang, na tapate, na zi leh na tapate' zite tawh na paikhawm ding uh hi
Nuntakna a nei khempeuh nang tawh a nungta dingin nam khatah nih ciat teembaw sungah na paipih ding hi. Tuate pen a nu leh a pa hi ding hi
Vasate amau' nam ciatin, ganhingte amau' nam ciatin, leilakah a bokvak ganhingte peuhmah amau' nam ciatin, a suakta dingin nam khatah nih ciat nang kiangah hong pai ding uh hi
A kine an nam khempeuh zong la in la khol in. Tuate pen nang leh amaute-a' dingin an ding ahi hi,” a ci hi
Noah zong tua bangmahin gamta a, Pasian' thupiak khempeuh a hih hi.
